mood: High energy, command-center feel, tactical minimalism. Competitive, connected, professional.

typography.guidelines: Bebas Neue for high-impact marketing headings (H1/H2). Manrope for UI, dashboard, and body text. JetBrains Mono for stats, scores, live timers, and technical data. Never use Inter for headings. Ensure tight tracking (letter-spacing) for Bebas Neue.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Control room grid for dashboards, bento layout for marketing sections. The bento grid should be asymmetrical.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for bento boxes. p-4 to p-6 for dashboard cards.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: radius-sm to radius-md (4px-8px) max to keep the tactical athletic feel.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dashboard forms. Center-align hero if visually appropriate. Strict grid adherence.

components.cards: Cardless look or 1px border (#262626) with #141414 background. No muddy shadows.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: #007AFF background. Live indicators: #FF3B30 background with pulse animation. Sharp or slightly rounded edges (max 8px).
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs. 1px solid border, focus ring #007AFF.
components.live_scoring_widget: Tactical look. JetBrains Mono for numbers. Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) for active 'LIVE' states and score highlights.
components.navigation: Sticky nav with bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, and border-b border-white/10. Logo and text must be high-contrast white.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. For sticky navs and critical modal overlays only.
visual_enhancers.borders: Grid borders. border-collapse style layout for leaderboards and standings tables.
visual_enhancers.motion: Hover translations (-translate-y-1). Accordion transitions. Pulse animation for live games.
visual_enhancers.textures: Minimalistic. Use pure CSS lines or very subtle dark noise on hero section, don't overwhelm the pure #0A0A0A.

hero_backgrounds.description: Soccer match at sunset, high energy. Ideal for main marketing hero background.
Illuminated stadium at night. Good for dashboard background, fixture banners, or active tournaments.

corporate_events.description: People gathered on a rooftop court at dusk. Relates to Connect & Grow theme.
Collection of trophies and awards. For leaderboard/standings header.

sponsor_logos.description: Mercedes Benz emblem on a white background. Use for Sponsor branding showcase.
Coca Cola sign. Use for Sponsor branding showcase.

player_avatars.description: Focused boxer in athletic stance. Player profile avatar.
Woman standing in the dark. Player profile avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use placeholder images; use the provided media URLs exclusively.
Follow the Performance Pro archetype: Dark theme with Volt Blue (#007AFF) primary and Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) for destructive/live actions.
Implement Bebas Neue for display headings. Include via Google Fonts if necessary. Use Manrope for UI.
Dashboard should have a 'control-room' feel using JetBrains Mono for data/stats. Utilize 1px grid lines and avoid soft shadows.
Hero sections MUST use a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 to-transparent) so text is highly readable against background images.
